tasks.name: task-1-types
tasks.summary: Added optional tauDecay to ScentPoint, optional tauDecayMin/tauDecayMax to OwnerScentProfile, kept ScentParams.tauDecay as fallback

tasks.name: task-2-config
tasks.summary: Added tauDecayMin/tauDecayMax to ScentParams, DEFAULT_SCENT_PARAMS, OWNER_PROFILES, and getOwnerProfile fallback

tasks.name: task-3-service
tasks.summary: emitTrailPoint now assigns per-point random tauDecay, sampleScentAt uses point.tauDecay with fallback to params.tauDecay

tasks.name: task-4-visual
tasks.summary: scentVisualizer ratio changed from linear age/maxTrailAge to exponential 1-exp(-age/tauDecay) per-point

tasks.name: task-5-tests
tasks.summary: Updated scentVisualizer fixtures with tauDecay, added per-point tauDecay scale tests, added integration test for tauDecay flow
